nasb.text: The sockets for the pillars were of bronze, the hooks of the pillars and their bands, of silver; and the overlaying of their tops, of silver, and all the pillars of the court were furnished with silver bands.

esv.text: And the bases for the pillars were of bronze, but the hooks of the pillars and their fillets were of silver. The overlaying of their capitals was also of silver, and all the pillars of the court were filleted with silver.

cnv.text: 柱座是銅做的，柱鉤和橫柱閂是銀做的，柱頂是用銀包裹的；院子的一切柱子都是用銀橫閂相連起來。

ccb.text: 柱子带凹槽的底座是铜的，柱子上面的钩和横杆是银的，柱顶包银，院子所有的柱子都用银杆相连。
